listening.title: Listening: Doctor's advice
listening.transcript: You should drink more water and rest. You shouldn't stay up too late before work. You should see a doctor if the headache continues.

questions.question: What should you do if the headache continues?
questions.explanation: "you should see a doctor if the headache continues."

listening.title: Listening: Workplace rules
listening.transcript: You don't have to work on weekends, but you have to wear formal clothes on Mondays and Fridays. Everyone has to arrive on time, no exceptions.

questions.question: Formal clothes required on: ___ and Fridays
questions.explanation: "you have to wear formal clothes on Mondays and Fridays."
